# WHOOP! WHOOP!

> A competitive memory card game by Oleeha & Co where matching rules change every round. Play online in the browser or pre-order the physical game.

WHOOP! WHOOP! is designed for 2–6 players, ages 7+, with 15–20 minute play time. Players flip face-down cards, memorize positions, and race to call out matching pairs by shape, number, or color — with rules that shift every round via dice rolls.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Play the game online, learn the rules, and pre-order the physical edition.
